# social.plus SDK

> social.plus is a feature-rich SDK for building chat, communities, feeds, live video, and social experiences. This document provides AI-consumable documentation for the full SDK: Getting Started, Core Concepts, Video SDK, Chat SDK, and Social SDK.

## Getting Started

- [Installation & Quick Start](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/overview): Install social.plus SDK and start building social features in minutes. Follow our straightforward setup guide.
- [Authentication](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/authentication): Authentication is required to access social.plus features. This comprehensive guide will take you from basic login to production-ready authentication patterns. 
- [Visitor Mode](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/visitor-mode): Enable public access to your community with visitor mode. Allow anonymous users to discover content while maintaining platform integrity through server-side read-only controls.
- [Android](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/platform-setup/mobile/android-quick-start): Get up and running with social.plus Android SDK for Kotlin/Java applications in minutes.
- [Flutter](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/platform-setup/mobile/flutter-quick-start): Get up and running with social.plus Flutter SDK for cross-platform applications in minutes.
- [iOS](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/platform-setup/mobile/ios-quick-start): Get up and running with social.plus iOS SDK for Swift applications in minutes.
- [TypeScript](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/getting-started/platform-setup/web/web-quick-start): Get up and running with social.plus TypeScript SDK for web applications in minutes.

## Core Concepts — Users

- [Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/overview): Comprehensive user management, authentication, safety, and moderation tools for social.plus SDK applications.
- [User Identity](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-identity): Understand how social.plus SDK handles user identity and data management without storing personal information.
- [Roles & Permissions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/roles-permissions): Implement role-based access control with social.plus SDK's comprehensive permission system for moderation and user management.
- [Create User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/create-user): Learn how to create new users in social.plus SDK through the login method
- [Get User Information](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/get-user-information): Retrieve user profiles and information using the UserRepository with real-time updates
- [Update User Information](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/update-user-information): Update user profiles, avatars, and metadata using the social.plus SDK
- [Delete User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/delete-user): Learn how to permanently delete users and their associated data from social.plus SDK
- [Search and Query Users](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/search-and-query-users): Learn how to search for users by display name and query user collections in social.plus SDK
- [Flag & Unflag Users](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/flag-unflag-user): Learn how to flag and unflag users for content moderation in social.plus SDK
- [User Token Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/user-management/user-operations/user-token-management): Learn how to manage user authentication tokens and credentials in social.plus SDK

## Core Concepts — Content

- [File Handling](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/files-images-and-videos/file): Comprehensive guide to file handling in social.plus SDK with upload, download, and management capabilities
- [Image Handling](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/files-images-and-videos/image-handling): Advanced image handling with social.plus SDK including upload, processing, optimization, and accessibility features
- [Video Handling](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/files-images-and-videos/video-handling): Comprehensive video handling with social.plus SDK including upload, transcoding, streaming, and multi-resolution support
- [Audio Handling](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/files-images-and-videos/audio-handling): Upload and manage audio files with metadata extraction, progress tracking, and format validation
- [Mentions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/mentions): Implement user mentions in posts, comments, and messages to boost engagement and enable direct communication within your social application
- [Polls](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/poll): Create interactive polls to boost user engagement and gather community feedback in your social.plus application
- [Reactions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/reactions): Manage user reactions on posts, stories, and comments with querying, adding, and removing functionality
- [Advertising](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/content-handling/ads): Seamlessly integrate ads into your social.plus application with console-driven configuration and comprehensive analytics

## Core Concepts — Realtime

- [Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/overview)
- [Live Objects & Collections](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/live-objects-collections/overview): Learn about observable data holders that provide real-time updates from local cache and server events
- [Android Live Objects/Collections](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/live-objects-collections/android): Live Objects are supported in the Android SDK with RxJava Data Streaming
- [Flutter Live Objects/Collections](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/live-objects-collections/flutter): Live Objects are supported in the Flutter SDK with Streams and LiveCollection for real-time data synchronization
- [iOS Live Objects/Collections](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/live-objects-collections/ios): Live Objects are supported in the iOS SDK with AmityObject and AmityCollection for real-time data synchronization
- [TypeScript Live Objects/Collections](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/live-objects-collections/typescript): Live Objects are supported in the TypeScript SDK with subscribable objects and collections for real-time data synchronization
- [Real-time Events](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/realtime-events/overview): Subscribe to live data updates and build responsive applications with social.plus SDK real-time event system
- [Chat Real-time Events](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/realtime-events/chat-realtime-events): Subscribe to chat events including channels, subchannels, messages, and member activities
- [Social Real-time Events](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/realtime-events/social-realtime-events): Subscribe to social platform events including communities, posts, comments, and user activities
- [Presence & Real-time Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/presence-state/overview): Build engaging real-time experiences with user presence, heartbeat synchronization, and channel activity tracking
- [User Presence Tracking](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/presence-state/user-presence): Monitor individual user online status, activity, and availability with real-time updates and efficient synchronization
- [Channel Presence Monitoring](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/presence-state/channel-presence): Track member activity and engagement in conversation channels with real-time presence updates and smart synchronization
- [Heartbeat Synchronization](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/presence-state/heartbeat-sync): Automatic presence synchronization with intelligent lifecycle management, adaptive intervals, and robust error handling
- [Logging & Errors](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/foundation/logging): Learn comprehensive logging & error handling strategies for robust social.plus applications.
- [PII Detection](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/safety-privacy/pii-detection): Automatically detect and optionally redact personally identifiable information (PII) in user-generated text across posts, comments, and messages.

## Core Concepts — Push Notifications

- [Push Notifications](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/overview): Engage users with real-time notifications for messages, mentions, and community activities across all platforms
- [Device Registration & Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/register-and-unregister-push-notifications-on-a-device): Complete guide to registering and managing push notification devices across iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, and Web platforms
- [Push Notification Settings](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/settings/overview): Configure user, channel, and community-level push notification preferences and controls.
- [User Notification Settings](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/settings/user-settings): Configure global push notification preferences for individual users across all their devices
- [Channel Notification Settings](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/settings/channel-settings): Configure push notification preferences for individual channels and conversations
- [Community Notification Settings](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/settings/community-settings): Manage push notification preferences for communities and social features
- [Android Push Notifications](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/setup/android-setup): Complete guide to implementing Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) and Baidu push notifications in Android social.plus SDK
- [Flutter Push Notification Setup](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/setup/flutter-setup): Implement cross-platform push notifications in Flutter apps using Firebase Cloud Messaging for both Android and iOS
- [iOS Push Notifications](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/setup/ios-setup): Complete guide to implementing Apple Push Notification service (APNs) with iOS social.plus SDK for real-time messaging and engagement
- [React Native Push Notifications](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/setup/react-native-setup): Complete guide to implementing cross-platform push notifications in React Native using Firebase Cloud Messaging and Apple Push Notification service
- [Web Setup](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/core-concepts/realtime-communication/push-notifications/setup/web-setup)

## Video — Getting Started

- [Video SDK Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/overview): Integrate live streaming and video capabilities into your applications with social.plus Video SDK
- [Getting Started with Video SDK](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/getting-started/overview): Quick start guide for integrating social.plus Video SDK into your application
- [Installation & Setup](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/getting-started/installation): Install and configure social.plus Video SDK for your platform
- [Authentication](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/getting-started/authentication): Set up user authentication for Video SDK features
- [Your First Live Stream](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/getting-started/first-stream): Build a simple live streaming feature step by step
- [Upgrading to Room-Based Livestreaming](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/migration-guide): Migrate from legacy Stream to the new Room-based livestreaming system for enhanced features and performance

## Video — Core Concepts

- [Core Concepts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/core-concepts/overview): Essential concepts for understanding social.plus Video SDK
- [Lifecycle Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/core-concepts/lifecycle-management): Master stream lifecycle, app state management, and resource cleanup for optimal social.plus Video SDK performance
- [Permissions Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/core-concepts/permissions): Handle camera, microphone, and storage permissions across platforms for social.plus Video SDK implementation
- [Streaming Basics](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/core-concepts/streaming-basics): Fundamental concepts of live streaming with social.plus Video SDK including stream lifecycle, states, and core principles
- [Video Quality & Performance](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/core-concepts/video-quality): Understanding video quality settings, resolution options, bitrate management, and performance optimization for social.plus Video SDK

## Video — Broadcasting

- [Broadcasting Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/overview): Introduction to room-based live broadcasting with co-hosting capabilities
- [Rooms Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/rooms-overview): Interactive live rooms with co-hosting, broadcasting, and playback capabilities
- [Broadcasting Setup & Configuration](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/setup): Configure advanced broadcasting features and optimize stream quality
- [Create Room](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/create-room): Set up rooms for co-hosting livestreams and collaborative broadcasting
- [Start Broadcasting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/start-broadcasting): Connect to LiveKit and start co-streaming with multiple hosts in a room
- [Live Room Viewing](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/live-viewing): Watch live rooms and handle real-time playback across all platforms
- [Manage Rooms](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/manage-rooms): Query, update, stop, and delete rooms with comprehensive lifecycle management
- [Camera Controls](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/camera-controls): Comprehensive guide to camera management and controls in social.plus Video SDK
- [Co-Host Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/co-host-management): Invite, manage, and coordinate co-hosts for collaborative room broadcasting
- [Advanced Broadcasting Features](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/advanced-features): Explore advanced broadcasting capabilities and professional streaming features
- [Recorded Room Playback](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/recorded-playback): Play recorded rooms after broadcast ends with full video player controls
- [Product Tagging](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/broadcasting/product-tagging): Pin and unpin products on livestream posts for real-time product showcasing

## Video — Playback & Notifications

- [Playback Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/playback/overview): Comprehensive guide to video playback and viewer experience with social.plus SDK
- [Video Push Notifications](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/notifications/push-notifications): Keep viewers engaged with real-time stream notifications, viewer updates, and broadcast alerts across all platforms
- [Stream Events](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/notifications/stream-events): Handle real-time stream events, viewer interactions, and broadcast state changes across your video application
- [Livestream Analytics](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/analytics/overview): Track watch minutes and viewer engagement for live and recorded room playback
- [Troubleshooting Overview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/troubleshooting/overview): Comprehensive troubleshooting guide for social.plus Video SDK
- [Stream Events Troubleshooting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/troubleshooting/events): Debug and resolve common stream event handling issues in your video streaming application
- [Notification Troubleshooting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/troubleshooting/notifications): Common issues and solutions for video stream notifications and events
- [Platform-Specific Troubleshooting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/video-new/troubleshooting/platform-issues): Troubleshooting guide for platform-specific issues with social.plus Video SDK

## Chat — Channels

- [Channel Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/overview): Create, manage, and organize chat channels with comprehensive lifecycle support
- [Create Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/create-channel): Build structured chat experiences by creating community, live, and conversation channels with custom configurations
- [Get Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/get-channel): Retrieve individual channels or query multiple channels by ID with real-time updates and live object support
- [Query Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/query-channels): Search and retrieve channels based on various criteria including display name, tags, membership status, and channel type
- [Update Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/update-channel): Modify channel properties including display name, avatar, tags, and metadata to keep channel information current and relevant
- [Archive Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/archive-channels): Archive and unarchive conversation channels to organize your chat list while preserving message history and functionality

## Chat — Channel Governance

- [Member Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/member-management): Add, remove, and manage channel membership to control who can participate in chat channels.
- [Role Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/role-management): Manage channel roles and permissions to control user access levels and moderation capabilities within chat channels.
- [Ban Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/ban-management): Ban and unban channel members to restrict access for users who violate community guidelines.
- [Mute Management](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/channels/governance/mute-management): Mute and unmute channel members to restrict messaging while allowing read-only participation.

## Chat — Members

- [Join & Leave Channels](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/join-leave-channel): Manage channel membership by joining and leaving channels, with real-time membership status monitoring and idempotent operations
- [Query Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/query-members): Search and retrieve channel members with advanced filtering by membership status, roles, and sorting options
- [Preview Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/preview-members): Get a quick preview of up to 4 channel members for conversation and community channels

## Chat — Messaging

- [Send a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/send-a-message): Comprehensive guide to sending messages with real-time synchronization, state management, and robust error handling
- [Text Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/text-message): Send formatted text messages with rich content support including mentions, formatting, and metadata
- [Image Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/image-message): Send image messages with captions, metadata, and automatic upload handling across all platforms
- [File Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/file-message): Share documents, attachments, and files with automatic upload handling, format validation, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Audio Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/audio-message): Send voice recordings and audio content with automatic processing, format optimization, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Video Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/video-message): Send video messages with automatic processing, thumbnail generation, and cross-platform compatibility
- [Custom Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/custom-message): Create flexible custom message types with structured JSON data for polls, location sharing, interactive content, and specialized use cases
- [Reply to a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/message-creation/reply-to-a-message): Create threaded conversations by replying to existing messages with support for text, media, and custom content types
- [Edit and Delete Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/edit-and-delete-messages): Modify and remove your own messages with proper permissions, audit trails, and user notifications for chat content management
- [Get and View a Message](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/get-and-view-a-message): Retrieve and display messages with comprehensive content handling for text, media, files, and custom message types
- [Query and Filter Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/query-and-filter-messages): Retrieve and filter messages from channels with advanced querying capabilities, sorting options, and real-time updates for dynamic chat experiences.
- [Flag and Unflag Messages](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/flag-unflag-a-message): Implement message flagging and moderation capabilities in social.plus SDK for community safety and content management

## Chat — Engagement

- [Message Preview](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/message-preview): Display quick message summaries in channel listings and notifications without loading full message content, optimizing performance and user experience.
- [Channel Unread Count](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/channel-unread-count): Track unread message counts at the channel level with real-time updates, total aggregation across channels, and mention status indicators for prioritized messaging.
- [Message Read Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-read-status): Mark individual messages as read and manage reading status for accurate unread count tracking with automatic detection and UI integration patterns.
- [Message Delivery Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-delivery-status): Track and manage message delivery confirmation, read receipts, and user engagement status in real-time chat applications with comprehensive delivery tracking capabilities.
- [Message Receipt Sync](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/engagement-features/unread-status/message-receipt-sync): Manage real-time message receipt synchronization infrastructure for accurate read and delivery tracking with optimized resource usage and lifecycle management.

## Chat — Moderation

- [Channel Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/content-moderation/channel-moderation)
- [Channel Rate-Limiting](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/content-moderation/channel-rate-limiting)
- [Ban/Unban a List of Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/ban-unban-a-list-of-channel-members): When a user is banned in a channel, they are removed from a channel and no longer able to participate or observe messages in that channel.
- [Mute/Unmute a List of Channel Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/mute-unmute-a-list-of-channel-members)
- [Roles and Permission](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/chat/moderation-safety/member-management/roles-and-permission)

## Social — Communities

- [Create Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/create-community): Create new communities with custom settings, privacy controls, post moderation, and metadata to build engaging spaces for your users
- [Update Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/update-community): Modify community settings, information, and configuration including display name, description, privacy settings, and post moderation
- [Delete Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/community-lifecycle/delete-community): Permanently delete communities and associated data with proper permissions and safety measures
- [Get Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/get-community): Retrieve community information including details, settings, and membership data for display and management
- [Query Communities](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/query-communities): Search and filter communities with advanced query capabilities including membership status, categories, and sorting options
- [Trending & Recommended Communities](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/discovery/trending-and-recommended-communities): Discover popular and personalized community recommendations to boost user engagement and drive community growth
- [Join Leave Community](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/join-leave-community)
- [Query Community Members](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/query-community-members)
- [Community Invitation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/membership/community-invitation)
- [Community Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/governance/community-moderation)
- [Community Categories](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/communities-spaces/organization/community-categories): Query and organize communities with categories for enhanced discovery and streamlined management

## Social — Posts

- [Text Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/text-post): Create simple text-based posts with mentions, hashtags, and rich formatting
- [Image Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/image-post): Create posts with single or multiple images, captions, and rich media support
- [Video Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/video-post): Create posts with video content, thumbnails, and rich media support
- [File Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/file-post): Create posts with file attachments like PDFs, documents, and other file formats
- [Custom Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/custom-post): Create custom post types with structured data for specialized content and unique user experiences
- [Get Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/get-post): Retrieve single or multiple posts with live object updates and comprehensive post data
- [Query Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/query-post): Search and filter posts with advanced querying capabilities for communities and user feeds
- [Edit Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/edit-post): Update and modify existing posts with support for text, image, video, and file content changes
- [Delete Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/delete-post): Delete posts with soft and hard deletion options for flexible content management
- [Flag & Unflag Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/flag-unflag-post): Report inappropriate content and manage community safety through comprehensive flagging functionality
- [Mentions in Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/mention-in-post): Tag users in posts to enhance engagement and foster community interaction with comprehensive mention functionality
- [Pinned Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/pinned-post): Highlight important content with pinned posts for announcements, featured content, and global visibility
- [Poll Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/poll-post): Create interactive poll posts to gather community feedback and engagement
- [Live Stream Posts](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/create-post/live-stream-post): Create posts with live streaming capabilities for real-time community engagement
- [Post Review & Moderation](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/posts/post-review): Implement content moderation with post review workflows, approval systems, and feed management for community quality control

## Social — Feed

- [Get User Feed](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/get-user-feed): Query user feed posts with community posts integration, enabling comprehensive user activity views across personal and community content
- [Query Global Feed](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/query-global-feed)
- [Custom Post Ranking](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/feed/custom-post-ranking)

## Social — Comments

- [Create Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/create-comment): Build engaging comment systems with text, image comments, replies, and real-time optimistic updates for seamless user experience
- [Get Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/get-comment)
- [Query Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/query-comment): Retrieve and filter comments with advanced querying, pagination, real-time updates, and comprehensive threading support
- [Edit Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/edit-comment)
- [Delete Comment](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/delete-comment)
- [Flag & Unflag Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/flag-unflag-comment): Comprehensive content moderation tools for reporting and managing inappropriate comments
- [Mentions in Comments](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/comments/mention-in-comment): Implement user mentions in comments with autocomplete, notifications, custom rendering, and comprehensive mention management

## Social — Reactions

- [Add & Remove Reactions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/reactions/add-remove-reaction)
- [Query Reactions](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/reactions/query-reactions)

## Social — Follow & User Relationships

- [Follow/Unfollow User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/follow-unfollow-user): Implement follow and unfollow functionality for user relationships
- [Accept/Decline Follow Request](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/accept-decline-follow-request): Manage incoming follow requests with accept and decline actions, including multi-platform code examples.
- [Get Follower/Following List](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/get-follower-following-list): Retrieve and manage follower and following lists with real-time updates and filtering.
- [Get Connection Status](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/following/get-connection-status): Check relationship status between users and track connection counters with real-time updates
- [Block & Unblock User](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/blocking/block-unblock-user): How to block and unblock users, product behavior, and multi-platform code examples.
- [Manage Blocked Users](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/user-relationship/blocking/manage-blocked-users): How to view and manage your blocked users list, with multi-platform code examples.

## Social — Notifications

- [Query Notification Tray Item](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/query-notification-tray-item)
- [Mark Notification Tray Item Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/mark-notification-tray-item-seen)
- [Mark Notification Tray Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/mark-notification-tray-seen)
- [Get Notification Tray Seen](https://docs.socialplus.com/social-plus-sdk/social/notification-tray/get-notification-tray-seen)
